title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF ABUCAYAN NORTE AND ABUCAYAN SUR, MUNICIPALITY OF CALAPE, PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5255 / 53 OG No. 16, 5142 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1702, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF ABUCAYAN NORTE AND ABUCAYAN SUR, MUNICIPALITY OF CALAPE, PROVINCE OF BOHOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following barrios in the Municipality of Calape, Province of Bohol, are created:

Barrio Abucayan Norte, which shall constitute the sitios of Cabulihan and Cabinong; and

Barrio Abucayan Sur, which shall constitute the sitios of Rama and Bino.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
